'''hasudhu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:wus|wus]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-s-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wus|wus]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| hasudhu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:hæsidhith|hæsidhith]] || [[word:hæsidhij|hæsidhij]] || [[word:hæsidhish|hæsidhish]] || [[word:hæsidhi|hæsidhi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:hasusudhuth|hasusudhuth]] || [[word:hasusudhuj|hasusudhuj]] || [[word:hasusudhush|hasusudhush]] || [[word:hasusudhu|hasusudhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:hasudhuth|hasudhuth]] || [[word:hasudhuj|hasudhuj]] || [[word:hasudhush|hasudhush]] || [[word:hasudhu|hasudhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:hasufdhuth|hasufdhuth]] || [[word:hasufdhuj|hasufdhuj]] || [[word:hasufdhush|hasufdhush]] || [[word:hasufdhuf|hasufdhuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:hasudhuthu|hasudhuthu]] || [[word:hasudhuju|hasudhuju]] || [[word:hasudhushu|hasudhushu]] || [[word:hasudhuku|hasudhuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:hasudhuth|hasudhuth]] || [[word:hasudhuj|hasudhuj]] || [[word:hasudhush|hasudhush]] || [[word:hasudhu|hasudhu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:hasudhuthul|hasudhuthul]] || [[word:hasudhujul|hasudhujul]] || [[word:hasudhushul|hasudhushul]] || [[word:hasudhukul|hasudhukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:hasudhuthuthu|hasudhuthuthu]] || [[word:hasudhujuju|hasudhujuju]] || [[word:hasudhushushu|hasudhushushu]] || [[word:hasudhuku|hasudhuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:hasudhuthun|hasudhuthun]] || [[word:hasudhujun|hasudhujun]] || [[word:hasudhushun|hasudhushun]] || [[word:hasudhukun|hasudhukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:hasudhuthuoro|hasudhuthuoro]] || [[word:hasudhujuoro|hasudhujuoro]] || [[word:hasudhushuoro|hasudhushuoro]] || [[word:hasudhukuoro|hasudhukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4a6dc77}}
